description_long: This is a compact, white van with a boxy shape and a slightly weathered exterior, showing signs of use and exposure to the elements. The van features large, rectangular side windows and a pair of rear doors, with visible hinges and a license plate mounted on the back. The roof is flat and appears to have some dents or irregularities, while the body sits on four steel wheels with visible dirt and wear. The front of the van has a wide windshield, rectangular headlights, and a simple grille, with side mirrors extending from the doors. The overall design suggests a utilitarian vehicle, likely used for transporting passengers or cargo in urban environments.
description: A weathered, white boxy van with large side windows, rear double doors, and a utilitarian design, showing signs of regular use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing double rear doors, license plate, and a flat, slightly dented roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting three large side windows, front door, and visible wheel wells.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide windshield, rectangular headlights, and simple grille.
description_view_3: Right side view with matching window and door configuration as the left, and visible front and rear wheels.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
